A chef seasoned the chicken with fresh herbs. A waiter lit the candles on the dining tables. A host sorted the reservation cards at the podium. A dishwasher organized the clean pans on the shelf.
A gardener harvested ripe tomatoes from the garden. A child collected colorful rocks in the garden. A butterfly landed on a sunflower in the garden. A squirrel ate a nut in the garden.
A teacher handed out the final exam papers. A student sharpened a pencil in the classroom. A principal walked down the quiet hallway. A janitor locked the front doors.
A pilot adjusted the altitude of the plane. A flight attendant checked the overhead bins on the plane. A passenger read a magazine on the plane. A ground crew worker waved a bright baton.
A farmer checked the water trough in the field. A farmhand drove the truck in the field. A cow mooed loudly in the field. A bird sang a song in the field.
A baker frosted a vanilla cake in the kitchen. A customer smelled the fresh bread in the bakery. A delivery boy checked the address on the box. A manager smiled at a customer in the bakery.
A scientist wrote notes in a thick notebook. A technician measured a chemical solution in a flask. A student asked a question in the lab. A cleaner wiped the lab benches.
A mechanic checked the oil in the car engine. A customer paid the bill at the counter. A manager answered a question at the counter. A dog barked outside the repair shop.
A librarian checked out a book for a patron. A child found a favorite storybook on the shelf. A student left the library with a backpack. A volunteer pushed a cart in the library.
